untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle is a visual/morphological pattern requiring multi-bar peak/trough analysis, cup symmetry detection, handle pullback ratio measurement, and throwback identification. These geometric pattern properties cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons and the allowed operators. Pattern detection requires sequential bar analysis, local extrema identification, and proportional measurements not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using breakout (close > prev_high) with volume confirmation and trend-following exit (close < sma_20). However, this lacks the essential cup formation shape detection, lip comparison logic, handle depth validation, and throwback confirmation that define this pattern. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition functions.
